nasb.text: And many were gathered together, so that there was no longer room, not even near the door; and He was speaking the word to them.

esv.text: And many were gathered together, so that there was no more room, not even at the door. And he was preaching the word to them.

cnv.text: 許多人就都來聚集，甚至連門前都沒有地方了，耶穌就對他們講道。

ccb.text: 立刻有许多人蜂拥而来，连门外也挤满了人。耶稣正给他们讲道的时候，

csbs.text: 许多人就聚集，甚至连门前都没有空处了。于是耶稣就向他们讲道。
